from dataclasses import dataclass

class Token:
    kind: str
    value: object
    line: int
    col: int

    def __init__(self, kind, value, line, col):
        self.kind = kind
        self.value = value
        self.line = line
        self.col = col


def tokenize(source: str) -> list:
    pass
